channel.title: Dr. Mnemosynec REMEMBERS for your AI

item.title: MMLU-Pro 97.1% — Canonical Plow Receipt (BP083)
item.description: 68 of 70 MMLU-Pro questions answered with new verified facts. 14/14 domains GREEN. Consumer hardware. No paid keys. Ollama + gemma4:12b.

item.title: Storm Test — Full Audit Trail (BP071)
item.description: Three failures at once. Nothing lost. Here are all 57 receipts.

item.title: Companies Joining In
